imageUrl column in Neon MenuItem table

iPad mode (station) — shared, no login, PIN-gated manager tab
Real hardware test — Square Terminal + new printers
notes: Bring Square Terminal + new Epson printers
Test: printer discovery, card auth, tip entry, receipt print
Goal: full POS loop on real hardware at Red Bar

tasks.title: Create new Neon DB instance in Orion org
notes: Schema is at ~/Desktop/AIR-Web/database/schema.sql — 39 tables, 1878 lines
Go to console.neon.tech → Orion org → New project

tasks.title: Run schema.sql against new Neon instance
notes: psql $DATABASE_URL < ~/Desktop/AIR-Web/database/schema.sql
Or use Neon SQL editor — paste schema.sql

tasks.title: Update DATABASE_URL in Vercel + .env.local
notes: Update in Vercel env vars for all environments
Update ~/Desktop/AIR-Web/.env.local

tasks.title: Run migrations (docs/migrations/*.sql)
notes: Run in order: 001-008 + beta-001
All at ~/Desktop/AIR-Web/docs/migrations/

tasks.title: Re-seed Red Bar Sushi data (restaurantId=7)
notes: Menu items from Square CSV: ~/Desktop/ML5CQXBJ175FH_catalog-2026-02-05-1326.csv
~650 food photos already on Shopify CDN
Run scripts/sync-food-photos.mjs + scripts/seed-modifiers.mjs

tasks.title: Verify tenant isolation — add tenant_id + restaurant_id to any missing tables
notes: Reference: ~/.openclaw/workspace/agency/standards/tenant-middleware-reference.ts
Every table must have tenant_id + restaurant_id

tasks.title: Delivery Conversion Engine (bag insert → direct order)
ElevenLabs Concierge (phones)
notes: ElevenLabs agent wired — renamed from Dave to Concierge
~1000-line page at /home/phone-ai/
Agent IDs in Vercel env

tasks.title: Maestro outbound calls — scheduled weekly business review
notes: EL outbound call API: POST /v1/convai/conversations/outbound
Owner sets schedule: call me every Monday 9am
Maestro pre-loads week data before calling (revenue, labor, chargebacks)
5-min weekly review on their personal phone — no app needed
Owner can take action mid-call: dispute, approve, schedule — all via voice

tasks.title: On-demand status call — owner calls or texts Maestro anytime
notes: "Hey Maestro, how are labor estimates holding up?"
Maestro pulls live data from MCP tools mid-call
Works from anywhere — beach, car, other restaurant
This is the sticky feature — no POS does this

tasks.title: Floor plan photo → table map (Claude Vision)
notes: Step 8 in demo wizard: upload photo of floor plan (paper, POS screenshot, napkin)
Claude Vision extracts: table numbers, positions, shapes, seats, sections
Output: [{id, x, y, shape, seats, section}] JSON → renders as interactive table map
Owner can drag/edit tables after generation
DB: floor_plans + floor_plan_elements tables already in schema
Fallback: blank grid builder if no photo available

tasks.title: ElevenLabs Maestro widget on demo/onboarding pages
notes: Floating chat button bottom-right, out of the way
Already built at /home/phone-ai — just needs surfacing on demo pages
Phase 1: general help (EL handles it)
Phase 2: context-aware via MCP v2 (knows what page owner is on)

tasks.title: Context-aware MCP task types — priority list
notes: 1. floor_plan_import — photo → Vision → table map
2. menu_cleanup — analyze menu, surface issues, auto-fix with approval
3. delivery_statement_upload — DoorDash/UberEats → chargeback detection
4. go_live_assistant — final checklist walkthrough before launch
Each = specific MCP task type with known input/output
Chat is just the trigger — MCP does the work

tasks.title: Post-menu onboarding CTA: test AIR in your restaurant
notes: After demo wizard complete: show next steps screen
CTA 1: Send us your floor plan (photo upload or message)
CTA 2: Book a 30-min setup call
CTA 3: Download the PWA and test at your restaurant
Reinforces: we make their life easy, we do the heavy lifting

tasks.title: POST /api/pi/heartbeat — Pi checks in, gets queued jobs
GET /api/pi/config — Pi pulls full restaurant config on boot
notes: All 7 printers, routing, tax rate, receipt layouts

tasks.title: pi-poller.sh v2 — ESC/POS format, all 7 printer IPs
notes: Deployed to Pi at Red Bar via Tailscale SSH
Confirmed printing Thai receipt successfully

tasks.title: No ngrok needed — Pi outbound HTTP only

tasks.title: air-mcp repo — enforcement layer between agents and backend
notes: Own repo: air-mcp
Enforcement layer between agents and backend
Handles: tenant isolation, agent auth, permissions, schema validation, rate limiting, audit logging
Agents never get direct DB access

tasks.title: Tenant isolation + agent auth + audit logging
Local config cache on Pi (offline fallback)
notes: Pi saves config to ~/.air-config.json after first successful MCP pull
Uses cached file if MCP unreachable on boot
Survives internet outages mid-shift

tasks.title: Pi auto-discovery → push printer scan to MCP
notes: Pi scans network on boot, sends discovered printers to /api/pi/discovered-printers
We assign station names remotely in MC
Routing config pushed back to Pi via next heartbeat

tasks.title: Pi config persisted to Neon DB
notes: Currently in Redis only — needs Neon for durability
Pi config table: restaurantId, printers JSON, routing JSON, updatedAt

tasks.title: Pi URL auto-pushed to restaurant config on registration
notes: When Pi first checks in, MCP stores its identity against restaurantId
App reads Pi URL from restaurant config — owner never enters it manually

tasks.title: Pi poller as systemd service (auto-start on boot)
notes: Add /etc/systemd/system/air-poller.service alongside existing air-box.service
Restarts automatically on crash
Runs as air user

tasks.title: Pre-ship Pi setup script
notes: One script we run before shipping: set RESTAURANT_ID + PI_AUTH_TOKEN + MCP_URL
Installs both systemd services
Verifies connectivity to MCP before marking ready to ship

tasks.title: Smart print routing — direct vs MCP queue
notes: App pings Pi directly first (GET http://pi-url/status, timeout 1s)
If reachable → fire direct (fast path, ~50ms)
If not reachable → fall back to MCP queue (remote path, ~3s)
Works on any network including cell failover
Kitchen tickets always fast when staff on restaurant wifi
Remote ops (Neil at home, Maestro) always work via queue

tasks.title: Print job confirmation callback
notes: When Pi confirms job printed → push notification to app
Toast message: Kitchen ticket printed ✓
Maestro can confirm: Your order fired to the kitchen
Failed jobs → alert + retry logic

tasks.title: Server-side tenant validation middleware on all API routes
notes: Reference: ~/.openclaw/workspace/agency/standards/tenant-middleware-reference.ts
Every route must verify Clerk session → org membership → inject tenantId

tasks.title: Add Clerk auth to Mission Control before public deploy
notes: MC currently has zero auth — anyone with URL sees everything

tasks.title: requireInternalAuth() wired into all Orion MCP routes
notes: lib/auth.ts exists in orion-mcp — needs wiring into each route handler

tasks.title: Rate limiting on all public API routes
notes: Use Vercel Edge middleware or upstash/ratelimit package

tasks.title: Dependabot enabled on all 8 repos
notes: Enabled Mar 8 via GitHub API — weekly Monday scans, auto-PRs for vulnerabilities

tasks.title: Add eslint-plugin-security to all projects
notes: npm install eslint-plugin-security --save-dev
Catches: unsafe regex, unvalidated input, prototype pollution

tasks.title: Run Snyk scan on AIR-Web before beta launch
notes: npx snyk test from ~/Desktop/AIR-Web
Free tier covers this

tasks.title: Build Sentinel — Orion-specific security agent
notes: Scans for: missing auth middleware on new routes, tables missing tenant_id, secrets in .md files
Runs on every PR via GitHub Actions
Reports to MC security page
Build during MCP v2 sprint

tasks.title: air-mcp enforcement layer — agents never touch DB directly
notes: Own repo: air-mcp
All agent DB access via MCP tools with tenant scope
Handles: permissions, schema validation, rate limiting, audit logging
